---
title: "Country Database Viewer"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

This page queries `countries.sqlite` using sql.js loaded from `libs/sqljs/`.
The database is fetched once and cached in the browser — other pages on this
site reuse the same cached copy automatically.

```{=html}
<style>
figure { width: 100%; max-width: 100%; }
figure > div { width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; }
table { width: 100%; }
</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| panel: sidebar

// ── Open the database ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// window._sqlJsReady and window._dbPath are set by _sqljs-init.html which
// is injected into every page via _quarto.yml.
db = {
  const SqlJs = await window._sqlJsReady;
  const response = await fetch(window._dbPath);
  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`DB fetch failed: ${response.status}`);
  const raw = new SqlJs.Database(new Uint8Array(await response.arrayBuffer()));

  // Return an Observable-compatible query wrapper
  return {
    query: (sql, params) => {
      const results = raw.exec(sql, params);
      if (!results.length) return [];
      const { columns, values } = results[0];
      return values.map(row =>
        Object.fromEntries(columns.map((col, i) => [col, row[i]]))
      );
    },
    count: (table) => {
      const r = raw.exec(`SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM "${table}"`);
      return r[0]?.values[0][0] ?? 0;
    },
    tables: () => {
      const r = raw.exec(
        "SELECT name FROM sqlite_schema WHERE type='table' AND name NOT LIKE 'sqlite_%' ORDER BY name"
      );
      return r[0]?.values.map(v => v[0]) ?? [];
    }
  };
}

// ── Table selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
table_names = db.tables()

viewof selected_table = Inputs.select(table_names, {
  label: "Select Table:",
  value: table_names[0]
})

// ── Rows per page selector ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
viewof pageSize = Inputs.select([10, 20, 50, 100], {
  label: "Rows per page:",
  value: 20
})
```

```{ojs}
//| panel: fill

// ── Pagination ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
total_rows = db.count(selected_table)
max_page   = Math.ceil(total_rows / pageSize)

viewof currentPage = Inputs.range([1, max_page], {
  label: "Page:",
  step: 1,
  value: 1
})

md`**Page ${currentPage}** of ${max_page} &nbsp;*(${total_rows} total rows)*`

// ── Fetch and display ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
offset     = (currentPage - 1) * pageSize
data_paged = db.query(
  `SELECT * FROM "${selected_table}" LIMIT ${pageSize} OFFSET ${offset}`
)

Inputs.table(data_paged, { layout: "auto", rows: pageSize })
```
